name: MobiMax R1 Long-Range Portable Radio

name: Baofeng UV-9R Plus Waterproof Radio

name: Kenwood TM-D710G Dual-Band Mobile Transceiver

name: MobiMax Tactical Whip Antenna (UHF/VHF)
description: Upgrade your walkie talkie ranges up to 30% with this foldable tactical whip antenna. Constructed with flexible spring steel, it can be bent and tucked inside loops when not in use.
